title: The 'Deep State' in Israel — Haim Bresheeth, historian
description:
Haim Bresheeth addresses the 85th meeting of the International Peace Coalition meeting on January 17, 2025.

Watch the full meeting here https://youtube.com/live/sZP0sNrTnX0?feature=share

Join the International Peace Coalition every Friday at 11am EST https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting
